title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
intro_title: A Space Where You Don't Have to Carry It All.
intro_text:
Finding the right therapist is a lot like finding a home. It has to feel right. Because the connection between us is the single most important factor in "successful" therapy, I offer a complimentary 15-minute consultation call for all new clients.

This is a low-pressure space for us to discuss what’s bringing you to therapy, explore how I can help, discuss possible modalities like EMDR or IFS-informed parts work, and ensure we are a good fit before we begin the deep work together.

options.label: Free Parking
options.text: The Liberty Street parking lot at 204 Liberty St, SW typically has the best availability.

options.label: Alternative
options.text: The Town Hall garage at 10 Loudoun St, SW is a reliable paid option.

options.label: Street Parking
options.text: Metered spots are available on Wirt St SW.

arrival.title: Arriving for Your Session
arrival.text: Please use the side entrance located on the left side of the building (marked for upper-level suites). Head up the stairs to our quiet waiting area. I will greet you exactly at our scheduled appointment time.
